Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

compressed_segments.text: Three browned, round pork sausage patties sit diagonally on a white rectangular plate, garnished with fresh green celery leaves. A lower banner features blue text reading "Pork Sausage Patties" and a "how2heroes" logo. The scene cuts to a chef in a white jacket and black-and-white striped apron standing behind a granite counter. Arranged before him are a metal bowl, a container of raw meat, small black cups, liquid containers, and an empty white rectangular plate. Another worker is visible in the background. The chef gestures with his hands, clasping them and opening his palms. The view cuts to a close-up of a metal pan over a blue gas flame. A hand pours liquid into the pan with the text overlay "heat 2 tbsp vegetable oil over medium-low". Finally, chopped white onions are poured from a clear container into the heated oil. From [20-22], a chef wearing a white coat and striped apron stands behind a kitchen counter, initially clasping his hands before extending his left arm to the right to retrieve a small plastic container filled with a pale yellow liquid. The blue text overlay "cook 10 minutes & cool completely" is visible at the bottom. Between [22-24], he lifts

[144-148] The chef's hands shape a portion of reddish-brown meat mixture into a patty above a silver bowl, pressing and smoothing it between palms. He places the patty onto a white rectangular plate on the granite counter beside another patty; two brown patties now rest there. His tattooed right arm reaches back to the bowl. [148-152] Hands manipulate a portion of ground meat above the bowl, shaping it into a round patty. To the left, the white plate holds a formed patty. The chef rolls the mixture between his palms, the star tattoo on his right forearm clearly visible. The "how2heroes" logo is in the upper right.

[152-160] A chef shapes a portion of ground meat into a round patty above a silver mixing bowl. The right hand, featuring star tattoos on the forearm, presses and rolls the mixture against the left palm. To the left, a white rectangular plate on the speckled granite countertop holds a previously formed patty. The "how2heroes" logo appears in the top right corner. The hands continue to compact and round the meat throughout the sequence.

Between 160 and 168 seconds, close-up footage shows hands manipulating a portion of ground meat mixture above a silver bowl. The right forearm, marked with star tattoos, presses the meat against the left palm to form a patty. As the segment progresses, the hands continue molding and pressing the mixture into a round patty shape. A white rectangular plate holding a previously formed patty remains visible on the speckled granite countertop to the left. The 'how2heroes' logo is displayed in the upper right corner. The action is repetitive, with the right hand consistently applying pressure against the left palm to refine the patty's form above the bowl.

[110-112] A chef in a white coat and striped apron stands at a speckled granite counter in a commercial kitchen with stainless steel fixtures and hanging lights, mixing a meat mixture in a silver bowl with both hands. A white plate and cloth are to his left, and small containers are to his right. [168-174] Hands continue molding the ground meat into a patty above the silver bowl. The right forearm, marked with star tattoos, presses the mixture against the left palm to form a round shape. A white rectangular plate holding a finished patty rests on the granite countertop to the left.

recent_thinks: [14-16] A hand uses a white spatula to stir the chopped white onions filling the metal pan over the blue gas flame. The blue text overlay at the bottom updates to read "2 cups chopped onion," replacing the previous heating instruction as the cooking continues.

[16-18] A hand uses a white spatula to stir the chopped white onions within the metal pan over a blue gas flame. The onions are spread across the pan's surface as they cook. The blue text overlay reading "2 cups chopped onion" persists at the bottom of the frame.

[174-176] Hands continue molding the ground meat mixture into a patty above a silver bowl. The right hand, marked with star tattoos on the forearm, presses the mixture against the left palm to refine its round shape. A white rectangular plate holding a finished patty rests on the speckled granite countertop to the left.

[176-178] Hands continue shaping the ground meat mixture into a patty above the silver bowl. The right hand, marked with star tattoos on the forearm, presses the mixture against the left palm to refine its round shape. A white rectangular plate holding a finished patty rests on the speckled granite countertop to the left.

queries.question: How many pork sausage patties are arranged on the white plate in the opening shot?

Given what is visible so far, could the chef add the egg yolks to the mixture? A. Yes — mixing bowl contains meat and egg yolks container is in hand B. No — mixing bowl is empty C. No — egg yolks container is missing D. No — no mixing bowl on counter

The right hand, marked with star tattoos on the forearm, presses the mixture against the left palm to refine its round shape. Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

compressed_segments.text: Three browned, round pork sausage patties sit diagonally on a white rectangular plate, garnished with fresh green celery leaves. A lower banner features blue text reading "Pork Sausage Patties" and a "how2heroes" logo. The scene cuts to a chef in a white jacket and black-and-white striped apron standing behind a granite counter. Arranged before him are a metal bowl, a container of raw meat, small black cups, liquid containers, and an empty white rectangular plate. Another worker is visible in the background. The chef gestures with his hands, clasping them and opening his palms. The view cuts to a close-up of a metal pan over a blue gas flame. A hand pours liquid into the pan with the text overlay "heat 2 tbsp vegetable oil over medium-low". Finally, chopped white onions are poured from a clear container into the heated oil. From [20-22], a chef wearing a white coat and striped apron stands behind a kitchen counter, initially clasping his hands before extending his left arm to the right to retrieve a small plastic container filled with a pale yellow liquid. The blue text overlay "cook 10 minutes & cool completely" is visible at the bottom. Between [22-24], he lifts

[120-128] A chef wearing a white coat and a black apron with white vertical stripes stands at a granite countertop in a commercial kitchen. He is vigorously mixing a meat mixture inside a silver bowl using his right hand while steadying the bowl with his left hand. To his left on the counter sits a white rectangular plate and a folded white cloth. To his right are two small black cups and a plastic container holding a yellow liquid. In the background, stainless steel kitchen equipment and another staff member are visible. The "how2heroes" logo appears in the top right corner. The chef maintains a steady rhythm as he mixes the ingredients thoroughly. The lighting in the kitchen is bright, reflecting off the stainless steel surfaces. The other staff member in the background is also wearing white. The chef looks down at the bowl, concentrating on the task.

[128-130] A chef mixes bowl contents with his right hand while steadying it with his left, then the scene cuts to a close-up of hands kneading a reddish-brown ground meat mixture inside a silver bowl on a granite countertop. [130-132] Fingers press and fold the ingredients thoroughly to combine, lifting slightly to display the meat's moist texture, with the "how2heroes" logo in the top right corner. [132-134] Hands lift a portion of the mixture from the bowl and manipulate it into a round shape above the container, revealing a tattoo of stars on the right wrist against the speckled granite background. [134-136] The hands form the portion into a patty, pressing and shaping the meat against the left palm while the remaining mixture stays in the bowl below.

[136-140] A chef's hands, distinguished by a star tattoo on the right wrist, press and smooth a portion of reddish-brown meat mixture into a patty above a silver bowl containing remaining ingredients. A white rectangular plate rests on the speckled granite countertop to the left. [140-142] The chef places the formed round patty onto the white plate and immediately reaches his right hand back into the silver mixing bowl to gather another portion of the meat mixture. [142-144] In a close-up view, the chef lifts a chunk of the ground meat and begins rolling it between his palms to shape a new patty, with the "how2heroes" logo visible in the upper right corner of the frame.

[144-148] The chef's hands shape a portion of reddish-brown meat mixture into a patty above a silver bowl, pressing and smoothing it between palms. He places the patty onto a white rectangular plate on the granite counter beside another patty; two brown patties now rest there. His tattooed right arm reaches back to the bowl. [148-152] Hands manipulate a portion of ground meat above the bowl, shaping it into a round patty. To the left, the white plate holds a formed patty. The chef rolls the mixture between his palms, the star tattoo on his right forearm clearly visible. The "how2heroes" logo is in the upper right.

He stands at a granite counter with a white plate and cloth to his left and small containers to his right. The background displays a commercial kitchen with stainless steel fixtures and hanging lights.

[152-154] A pair of hands shapes a portion of ground meat into a round patty above a silver mixing bowl. The right hand, featuring a star tattoo on the forearm, presses and rolls the mixture against the left palm. In the background, a white rectangular plate holds a previously formed patty on the speckled granite countertop.

queries.question: What color is the chef's coat worn by the person preparing the food? A. Black B. Blue C. White D. Grey
